name: Skuf vs beer bottle party
short_description: Once again, the thirst for alcohol drives him
detailed_description:
Once again, the thirst for alcohol drives him... an old and sweaty skuf. He drank and accumulated garbage in his apartment for so long that one day, a beer bottle gained consciousness and decided to escape from him, without letting him drink it. To escape from the skuf and find his altushka - that is the goal of the one who has just gained consciousness!

Skuf vs Beer Bottle Party - A top-down game where the player, as a beer bottle, runs away from the skuf, fights off mortal skulls that are chasing their drunken target, and searches for the altushka, the only one for whom he saved his liquid.

Controls:

Left Mouse Button - Hit the skulls

WASD - move

Game Features:

  • Visual style

  • Many locations

  • High Difficulty
